findings.title: CVE-2025-61481: WebFig/REST credentials exposed over cleartext HTTP
findings.description: The router serves WebFig and REST API over HTTP (port 80) with Basic Auth. Credentials are transmitted in base64 (trivially reversible) without TLS encryption. No HTTP->HTTPS redirect is enforced. Any network observer can capture admin credentials. This is a design-level issue inherent to HTTP Basic Auth without forced HTTPS.
reproduction_steps: 2. Observe Authorization: Basic header in cleartext
3. base64 -d the value to recover credentials

findings.title: CVE-2023-41570 REGRESSION: REST API ignores IP ACL restrictions
findings.description: 20 REST API endpoints were accessible despite IP address restriction on www service. The ACL bypass allows unauthorized access from non-permitted IP ranges.

findings.title: Router crash during CVE-2023-30799 regression
findings.description: Router stopped responding during CVE-2023-30799 regression testing. This may indicate the vulnerability is not fully patched or a related issue exists.

findings.title: Router crash during CVE-2019-3976 regression
findings.description: Router stopped responding during CVE-2019-3976 regression testing. This may indicate the vulnerability is not fully patched or a related issue exists.
